title: Books, courses, and selected offerings.
lead: This page presents books, classes, and other offerings without requiring an online checkout.

products.title: Signed Book
products.text: A signed book offering with a short introduction, a warm description, and an easy contact button.

products.title: Japanese Cooking Course
products.text: A practical and welcoming Japanese cooking experience with room for questions, stories, and shared discovery.

products.title: Private Workshop Inquiry
products.text: For libraries, communities, teams, and private groups looking for a custom experience around books or Japanese food culture.
